name: ssh-exec
description: Remote command execution and sshfs mounting over OpenSSH

interface.shortDescription: Find SSH hosts, run remote commands, and mount remote files over OpenSSH.
interface.longDescription: SSH Exec provides three tools: host for discovering configured remote hosts, mount for mounting a remote host locally so Codex can use built-in file tools, and exec for remote commands such as inspection, verification, and service control.
interface.defaultPrompt: If you are not sure whether a remote host alias exists, use host first. Use mount before editing remote files, then use exec to inspect or verify the remote host.
